mapper.sql: ui.id, ui.user_id, ui.item_id, ui.asset_id, ui.class_id, ui.instance_id, ui.name, ui.icon_url, ui.exterior, ui.paint_seed, ui.paint_wear, ui.is_marketable, ui.status, ui.market_price, ui.acquired_at, ui.created_at, ui.updated_at

i.id as item_id, i.name as item_name, i.name_cn as item_name_cn, i.category as item_category, i.quality as item_quality, i.exterior as item_exterior, i.icon_url as item_icon_url, i.buff_price as item_buff_price
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM user_inventory ui LEFT JOIN item i ON ui.item_id = i.id WHERE ui.id = #{id}

SELECT ,
FROM user_inventory ui LEFT JOIN item i ON ui.item_id = i.id WHERE ui.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ui.created_at DESC

SELECT ,
FROM user_inventory ui LEFT JOIN item i ON ui.item_id = i.id WHERE ui.user_id = #{userId} AND ui.is_marketable = 1 ORDER BY ui.created_at DESC

SELECT ,
FROM user_inventory ui LEFT JOIN item i ON ui.item_id = i.id WHERE ui.user_id = #{userId} AND ui.asset_id = #{assetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_inventory ( user_id, item_id, asset_id, class_id, instance_id, name, icon_url, exterior, paint_seed, paint_wear, is_marketable, status, market_price, acquired_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{assetId}, #{classId}, #{instanceId}, #{name}, #{iconUrl}, #{exterior}, #{paintSeed}, #{paintWear}, #{isMarketable}, #{status}, #{marketPrice}, #{acquiredAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_inventory WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id NOT IN ( SELECT inventory_id FROM sell_order WHERE inventory_id IS NOT NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_inventory WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_inventory SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_inventory WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_inventory ui WHERE ui.item_id IS NULL ORDER BY ui.created_at DESC
